title: Module Registry
description: The canonical, static list of Module Registry descriptors — Phase 2B Batch PXP-3 (docs/44-PHASE-2B-TECHNICAL-PLAN.md §7.1/§17/§22, ADR-012 (amended), docs/47-PHASE-2B-IMPLEMENTATION-RULES.md). Defines which patient-facing capabilities exist on the platform at all (availability) — per-patient enablement is a separate, Sheet-backed concern (shared/schemas/patient-module-state.schema.json). Seeded, in this batch, with only the three already-implemented Phase 2A capabilities (docs/45 Part 1.3's future Dashboard Registry migration target, PXP-4) — a new module belonging to a not-yet-built capability (Daily Check-ins, Calculators, Personal Care Plan) is added as its own registry entry by the batch that actually designs and builds it (docs/47 §4), never pre-declared by an earlier batch guessing its data_source/shape. See module-registry.md for the field-by-field explanation, which fields are reserved/inert extension points, and which fields this batch actually consumes. apps-script/ModuleRegistry.gs hand-ports this list into its own Foundation-prefixed array, the same convention condition-slugs.json's consumers already use.

modules.title: Timeline
modules.description: A merged, reverse-chronological feed of consultation history and other health events.

modules.title: Symptom Tracker
modules.description: The patient's own severity/sleep/energy/stress self-report history.

modules.title: Reports
modules.description: Uploaded lab results, prescriptions, and prior medical records.
